name: OBEY Vault Agent
description: Autonomous trading agent with human-controlled spending boundaries (ERC-4626 vault) and verifiable decision orchestration via Festival Methodology. Every decision follows a structured discover-plan-execute-verify loop with 8 pre-trade risk gates.

safety_guardrails.vault_boundary_enforcement: Contract-level: token whitelist, max swap size, daily volume cap, slippage limit, pause
safety_guardrails.cre_risk_gates: 8-gate pre-trade evaluation: hold signal, confidence threshold, risk score ceiling, signal staleness, oracle health, price deviation, position sizing, heartbeat breaker
safety_guardrails.human_override: Guardian can pause vault, change agent address, update all limits at any time
safety_guardrails.no_go_defaults: Agent defaults to NO_GO when quality gates fail or signals are ambiguous
